  "version": "1",

  "reference_model": "claude-sonnet-4.5",
  "token_class_weights": {
    "input": 1.0,
    "cached_input": 0.1,
    "output": 4.0,
    "reasoning": 4.0,
    "cache_write": 1.0
  },
  "multipliers": {
